name: Admost
description: Mobile ad mediation SDK with automated waterfall optimization across 40+ ad networks for maximum eCPM.

seo.title: Admost — Ad Monetization / Mediation
seo.meta_description: Admost: Mobile ad mediation SDK with automated waterfall optimization across 40+ ad networks for maximum eCPM.

when_to_use: Automated waterfall optimization across 40+ ad networks for games
Maximizing eCPM via in-app bidding mediation SDK
A/B testing ad placements and formats for rewarded video
Replacing manual waterfall management with automated eCPM floors

pros: Integrates 40+ ad networks out of the box
Automated waterfall tuning saves manual work
cons: Fewer direct deals than MAX or LevelPlay
Support response time can be slow
SDK size adds to app binary
review.verdict: Credible MAX/LevelPlay alternative if you dislike the big-player lock-in, but expect less demand.
review.best_for: Mid-size game publishers wanting mediation without being tied to AppLovin or Unity.
review.not_for: Top-100 publishers needing maximum demand density and enterprise SLAs.

lock_in.reason: Mediation waterfall config proprietary to Admost

developer_experience.reason: Mobile SDKs with ad-network integration docs
